change_message: Improve routing rubric and reduce ambiguity.

definition.description: Candidate support routing prompt with explicit rubric.

metadata.commit_message: Improve routing rubric and reduce ambiguity.

definition.name: support_classifier
definition.template:
You are classifying customer support requests for routing.
Choose exactly one label: billing, technical, account, shipping.
Rules:
- billing: charges, refunds, invoices
- technical: bugs, crashes, app behavior
- account: login, password, profile, cancellation
- shipping: delivery, package status, address
Customer message: {{ customer_message }}
Answer with only the label.

name: support_classifier
